states.description: Android app drawer listing all installed apps

visual_cues: day-of-week or date indicator on right (Tue/Fri/Yest/Tmrw/Oct N)

bottom bar with hamburger, mic, sort, overflow icons
No start date / No due date rows with clock icon
Add location, Add tags, Add subtask, Description fields

states.description: Bottom-sheet combined date and time picker
visual_cues: quick date presets (Today/Tomorrow/Next Sun/No date) on left
quick time presets (09:00/13:00/17:00/20:00/Pick time/No time) on right

states.description: SELECT TIME dialog with analog clock face
visual_cues: keyboard icon bottom-left to toggle manual entry

states.description: Keyboard input mode of time picker
visual_cues: Hour and Minute numeric input boxes
Does not repeat / Every day / Every week / Every month / Every year / Custom...
Repeats on day-of-week circles (S M T W T F S)
list of existing tags with checkboxes

states.description: Map view for selecting task location
visual_cues: Select this location button at bottom

states.description: Certificate trust prompt for map/location service
Bottom sheet for grouping, sorting, completed sorting, and toggles
visual_cues: Move completed tasks to bottom toggle

states.description: Bottom sheet listing sort criteria options
visual_cues: By due date / By start date / By priority / By title / By last modified / Smart sort / By creation time / By completion time
Are you sure you want to discard your changes?
large blue circle with white checkmark

strategies.name: CREATE_TASK_WITH_DATE_TIME
steps: click red + FAB
type task name
click 'No due date'
select date via calendar or quick preset
select time via quick preset OR click 'Pick time' for custom
for non-preset times use clock face or keyboard icon for manual entry
click OK to confirm date/time
click save (floppy) icon top-left
strategies.success_signal: new task appears in My Tasks list with correct date/time chip
strategies.fallback: reopen task by tapping its row to verify and edit fields

strategies.name: EDIT_TASK_PROPERTIES
strategies.preconditions: task_list visible and target task identifiable
steps: tap on task row (not checkbox) to open editor
tap priority circle (red=high, yellow=medium, blue=low, grey=none)
tap 'Does not repeat' and choose recurrence preset, or Custom... for advanced
tap 'Add subtask', type name, press keyboard checkmark
tap save icon top-left
strategies.success_signal: task list shows updated color checkbox / repeat icon / subtask count
strategies.fallback: if save returns to list without changes, reopen task and verify each field

strategies.name: SET_CUSTOM_RECURRENCE
steps: click 'Does not repeat'
click 'Custom...'
tap 'Repeats every' number field and edit interval (clear existing digit carefully)
change unit dropdown if needed (week/month/etc.)
tap day-of-week circles to toggle desired days
under Ends pick On (date) or After (count) and edit value
tap back arrow to apply
strategies.success_signal: task_editor shows summary like 'Repeats every N <unit> on <days> until/occurs ...'
strategies.fallback: re-enter Custom recurrence to fix interval typos like '21' instead of '2'

strategies.name: CONFIGURE_SORT_AND_GROUP
steps: click sort icon in bottom bar
click 'Grouping' and select desired option
click 'Sorting' and select desired option
click 'Completed' and select desired sort
toggle 'Move completed tasks to bottom' as needed
dismiss sheet via back or tap outside
strategies.success_signal: sort sheet labels reflect chosen options; list re-orders accordingly
strategies.fallback: if overflow (three dots) was opened by mistake, close and use sort icon instead

strategies.name: MARK_TASK_COMPLETE
strategies.preconditions: task_list visible and target task located
steps: tap the checkbox at left of the task row
strategies.success_signal: 'Task completed' toast appears and task is removed from active section
strategies.fallback: if details opened instead, back out and tap precisely on checkbox

strategies.name: QUERY_TASK_FIELD
steps: scan list for target task title
tap task row to open editor if field not shown in list
read value of date/time/priority/repeat/location row
provide answer
strategies.fallback: scroll list both directions to confirm count/values

strategies.name: ATTACH_CURRENT_LOCATION
steps: click 'Add location'
click crosshair button to center on current GPS
grant location permission if prompted
click 'Select this location'
if cert warning appears, check 'I have manually verified...' then ACCEPT, retry
strategies.success_signal: location address appears in task editor row
strategies.fallback: if internal error toast appears, re-center and retry Select this location

dead_ends.failed_action: tapping 'No due date' multiple times expecting menu
dead_ends.note: some taps cycle text rather than open dialog; use Custom... in recurrence menu for advanced control
typing appends instead of replacing; resulting in values like '21' or '12' - need to position cursor and backspace carefully

dead_ends.failed_action: selecting hour on inner ring imprecisely
dead_ends.note: can accidentally jump to minute mode; switch to manual keyboard entry for precision

dead_ends.failed_action: clicking 'Select this location' before cert trusted
dead_ends.note: triggers cert4android warning; must accept certificate first
entering '1' yields 1:00 AM; must enter 13 or use 13:00 preset
these are different apps; Tasks icon is blue circle with white checkmark

dead_ends.failed_action: opening overflow (three dots) seeking sort options
dead_ends.note: overflow only has Clear Completed/Show completed; sort lives in dedicated sort icon

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Application is open at its main list/collection screen
abstract_steps: Invoke the primary 'add new' affordance (usually a floating action button)
Enter the required title/name into the focused input
Open and configure secondary properties (date, time, recurrence, priority, tags, location, description) via their respective rows
For each property choose either a quick preset or open an advanced picker
Confirm each picker dialog
Commit the new entry via the save/confirm control
failure_modes: Pressing back before saving discards the entry
Quick presets not matching the required value, requiring advanced picker
Typing into a non-focused field (text goes into wrong widget)
24-hour vs 12-hour confusion when entering times
verification_checklist: New entry visible in the main list
Displayed metadata (date/time/priority badges) matches input
Reopening the entry shows all configured fields persisted

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target entry is visible in a list or reachable via search
abstract_steps: Locate the target entry by scanning or searching
Open its detail/edit view by tapping the entry (avoiding completion/delete affordances)
Modify required property rows one at a time
Confirm any sub-dialogs that appear
Save via the explicit save control
failure_modes: Tapping the wrong row item (e.g., adjacent entry) opens incorrect detail
Tapping a status checkbox marks complete instead of opening detail
Unsaved changes lost when navigating back without confirmation
verification_checklist: Detail view reflects new values after save
List view badges update to reflect changes
No unsaved-changes prompt appears on subsequent navigation

categories.name: DELETE_OR_COMPLETE_ENTRY
abstract_steps: Identify target entry
Tap status toggle (checkbox) or open detail and use delete control
Confirm any prompt
failure_modes: Tap location too close to text opens detail instead of toggling
Bulk operations require menu access not always discoverable
verification_checklist: Entry disappears from active list or appears struck-through in completed section
Confirmation toast displayed

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Data is stored within the app and reachable via list/detail screens
abstract_steps: Open the relevant collection screen
Scroll or search to locate matching entries
Read the requested attribute from list row or open detail for hidden fields
Aggregate counts/values across scrolled views carefully to avoid double counting
Return the formatted answer
failure_modes: Over- or under-counting due to large scroll jumps
Confusing similar-looking date labels (relative vs absolute)
Treating completed/struck-through entries as active or vice versa
verification_checklist: Scrolled through entire list at least once in both directions
Answer format matches user's requested format
Distinct entries counted exactly once

categories.name: CONFIGURE_VIEW_SETTINGS
categories.precondition: List screen visible with sort/group affordances
abstract_steps: Open the sort/view configuration control (often a dedicated icon, not the overflow menu)
Tap the dimension to change (grouping / sorting / completed sorting)
Select the desired option from the option sheet
Toggle any boolean preferences (e.g., move-completed-to-bottom)
Dismiss the configuration sheet
failure_modes: Confusing overflow menu with sort menu
Selection not registering and needing a retry
Settings scoped per-list and not global
verification_checklist: Configuration sheet displays the chosen labels
List visibly re-orders/regroups to reflect selection

categories.name: SET_DATE_TIME
categories.precondition: In an editor with a date/time row
abstract_steps: Open the date/time picker via the date row
Choose a date via calendar navigation or preset
Choose a time via preset, analog clock, or keyboard-numeric entry
Account for 24-hour clock when converting AM/PM
Confirm sub-dialogs in order (time then combined date+time)
failure_modes: Selecting AM time when PM intended
Picker dialog confirmations skipped, losing selection
Calendar arrow navigation overshooting target month
verification_checklist: Editor row shows the selected absolute date and time
Reopening the picker shows the same selection highlighted

categories.name: SET_CUSTOM_RECURRENCE
categories.precondition: In an editor where simple presets are insufficient
abstract_steps: Open recurrence menu and choose Custom
Set numeric interval, carefully handling text-field editing
Choose unit (day/week/month/year)
Select specific days of week or month if applicable
Choose end condition (never, on date, after N occurrences)
Apply via back/confirm control
failure_modes: Numeric field appends instead of replacing, producing wrong interval
Forgetting to select end condition leaves it as Never
Confusing two identical letter buttons (e.g., two 'T' for Tue/Thu)
verification_checklist: Editor summary line accurately reflects interval, days, and end condition

categories.name: ATTACH_LOCATION
categories.precondition: In editor with location field; device supports map services
abstract_steps: Open location picker
Center map on current position or search
Grant location permission if requested
Accept any certificate or trust prompts
Confirm selection
failure_modes: Map fails to load due to untrusted certificate
Permission denial blocks current-location fix
Internal errors after selection require retrying
verification_checklist: Address text appears in the editor's location row
Map reopens with same pin if revisited

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO_APP
categories.precondition: Device on home screen or another app
abstract_steps: Return to home if necessary
Open app drawer
Scroll to find target app (alphabetical)
Launch the correct icon, verifying its label
failure_modes: Launching a visually similar but different app
Splash screen still loading - need to wait
Network/sync errors blocking initial entry
verification_checklist: App's main screen rendered with expected widgets
Header/title matches expected app
